story.iWant: to be guided through project naming within the conversational flow and have a seamless initialization experience
story.soThat: I don't have to switch contexts between "chatting" and "form filling" and can efficiently set up my project
story.tasks: - Refactor Workflow Steps (AC: 1, 2, 7) - Remove existing Step 1 (Set field type) from `workflow-init-new` seed - Seed **Step 1** as the Chat/Athena step (was Step 3) - Seed **Step 2** as the Directory Selection step (was Step 2) - Update Tool Configurations (AC: 3) - Update `update_complexity` tool to use hardcoded "greenfield" literal - Update `select_workflow_path` tool to use hardcoded "greenfield" literal - Implement `update_project_name` Tool (AC: 4, 5) - Add `update_project_name` to `AskUserChatStepConfig` in Step 1 - Configure tool trigger (post-path selection) - Configure generic OptionCard/approval UI for name suggestion - Implement validation logic (`^[a-z0-9-]+$`) - Update Chat Completion (AC: 6) - Add `update_project_name` to `requiredTools` - Verify completion logic requires all approvals - Testing (AC: 8) - Verify `bun db:seed` runs cleanly with new order - Verify end-to-end conversational flow followed by directory selection

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. Workflow structure is refactored to remove the redundant "field type" step (old Step 1). 2. Steps are reordered to prioritize the conversation: **Step 1 = Chat (Athena)**, **Step 2 = Directory Selection**. 3. Existing tools (`update_complexity`, `select_workflow_path`) use hardcoded "greenfield" filter instead of a variable. 4. A new `update_project_name` tool is implemented within the Chat Step (Step 1). 5. The project naming tool enforces kebab-case validation (`^[a-z0-9-]+$`). 6. The Chat Step completion condition requires the project name to be approved. 7. Step 2 (Directory Selection) prompts the user *after* the project details are finalized. 8. The entire flow (Chat [Summary -> Complexity -> Path -> Name] -> Directory) works end-to-end.

artifacts.docs: - path: docs/architecture/STORY-1-6-ARCHITECTURE-SUMMARY.md title: Story 1.6 Architecture Summary section: Core Architecture Decision snippet: "An approval-gate chat workflow where: 1. PM Agent chats... 2. Agent triggers side effects... 3. User reviews... 4. System learns..." - path: docs/architecture/dynamic-tool-options.md title: Dynamic Tool Options System section: Solution: `optionsSource` Configuration snippet: "The solution adds an `optionsSource` field to tool configurations that: 1. Fetches options dynamically... 3. Provides structured metadata..." - path: docs/epics/epic-1-foundation.md title: Epic 1: Foundation + Workflow-Init Engine section: Story 1.7: Workflow-Init Steps 7-8 (Naming) snippet: "Implement workflow-init steps 7-8: Generate project name suggestions (LLM structured output), user selects name or provides custom..."
artifacts.code: - path: packages/scripts/src/seeds/workflow-init-new.ts kind: file symbol: seedWorkflowInitNew lines: 1-397 reason: Primary seed file defining the workflow structure and tool configurations. Needs refactoring (remove Step 1, reorder) and new tool addition. - path: packages/api/src/services/workflow-engine/step-handlers/ask-user-chat-handler.ts kind: class symbol: AskUserChatStepHandler lines: 37-1202 reason: Handler for the chat step. Ensures validation logic and tool execution flow are supported.
artifacts.dependencies: - node:fs (Node.js File System) - simple-git (Git operations) - @mastra/core (AI Agent Framework) - @ax-llm/ax (Structured Generation)

story-context.constraints: - Project name must be kebab-case (`^[a-z0-9-]+$`). - Workflow must be idempotent (seed script must handle updates cleanly). - Step order must be Chat -> Directory. - Use generic `ax-generation` tool type for consistency.
story-context.interfaces: - name: AskUserChatStepConfig kind: interface signature: "interface AskUserChatStepConfig { agentId: string; tools: ToolConfig[]; completionCondition: { type: 'all-tools-approved', requiredTools: string[] }; ... }" path: packages/db/src/schema/step-configs.ts

tests.standards: Use `bun test` for unit tests. Validate seed script idempotency by running `bun db:seed` multiple times. Test end-to-end flow manually or via integration test script.
tests.ideas: - Verify `workflow_steps` table has correct step numbers after seeding. - Verify `AskUserChatStepConfig` includes `update_project_name` in `tools` and `requiredTools`. - Verify regex validation prevents invalid project names.
